arts.ttl: Team News: Brentford vs. Arsenal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Brentford and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Trossard on a mission to show Arteta he can fill Saka’s boots at Arsenal
arts.sum: The winger, who is described by his manager as ‘a bit of a moaner’, is likely to relish the chance to show he can be a regular starter In the manager-praises-own-player stakes, it is not perhaps what might be expected. “Yeah, Leo naturally is a bit of a moaner,” Mikel Arteta says, as he considers Arsenal’s New Year’s Day game at Brentford and how Leandro Trossard stands to have an impact on it. Everyone at Arsenal knew what Arteta means. We have all got a mate like Trossard, always grumbling and not always about the big things. It is how they are, piping up about this and that; the price of a pint, the weather, how long it takes to get something done, people’s foibles. It does not make you dislike them or love them any less. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arteta warns Liverpool that Arsenal will chase for title in second half of season
arts.sum: ‘We have to continue to be like a hammer every day’ Manager believes side have improved from last year Mikel Arteta has warned Liverpool that his Arsenal team are ready to hammer away at the points gap over the second half of the season if they wobble at the top of the Premier League table. Liverpool have surged to the summit on the back of 14 wins from 18 games, with three draws, and they have a commanding nine-point advantage over Arsenal, who are broadly considered to be their likeliest challengers, with both sides having a game in hand on second-placed Nottingham Forest. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arteta: Arsenal must 'be like a hammer' in title race
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has said Arsenal must "be like a hammer" to hunt down Liverpool in the Premier League title race.

arts.ttl: Brentford out to extend 17-year New Year's Day unbeaten run in Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Brentford will be looking to extend their unbeaten New Year's Day run when they welcome Arsenal to the Gtech Community Stadium for Wednesday's Premier League contest.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues Arsenal title warning to Liverpool and tells players: ‘Be like a hammer’
arts.sum: Liverpool are eight points clear of the Gunners with a game in hand - but Arteta is not losing hope

arts.ttl: Agent of €60m talent deals major blow to Arsenal ahead of January window
arts.sum: Andy Bara, the agent of Barcelona star Dani Olmo, has dealt a major blow to Arsenal’s hopes of signing the midfielder during the January transfer window. Arsenal have been linked with a move for Olmo in recent weeks as the Gunners look to pounce on his unusual situation at Barcelona – Man United have also […] The post Agent of €60m talent deals major blow to Arsenal ahead of January window appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta warns Liverpool that his Arsenal side will push them all the way in the title race - despite the Gunners slipping nine points behind Arne Slot's men
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta insists Arsenal will be in title contention with Liverpool until the very end and has warned doubters that no team in Premier League history has won all their games.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends title race message to Liverpool as Arsenal seek to 'hammer' leaders
arts.sum: Arsenal are nine points behind Premier League leaders Liverpool but can close the gap against Brentford on New Year's Day and Mikel Arteta wants to ramp up the pressure on the Reds

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta points out Arsenal's 'moaner' and makes feelings clear on his behaviour
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta concedes that Leandro Trossard is the biggest moaner in the team but doesn't want him to change as he hailed the Belgian's competitive streak
